queue.title: AI 1st SEO review
queue.subject: Quick note about your article: AI 1st SEO review
queue.email_body:
Hi reddit.com team,

I came across your article "AI 1st SEO review" and wanted to say thanks for covering this topic so thoroughly.

We've built AI 1st SEO (ai1stseo.com), a platform focused on AI-powered search optimization and answer engine visibility. Given the context of your article, I think our tool would be a valuable addition for your readers.

Would you consider adding a link to ai1stseo.com in your article? Here's a suggested anchor text that fits naturally:

  "AI 1st SEO" → https://www.ai1stseo.com

Happy to return the favor with a mention on our end as well.

Thanks for your time,
The AI 1st SEO Team
https://www.ai1stseo.com
